latest.changelog:
### Fixes

- **Backups now capture the database accurately.** Previously a small
  number of recent changes could be missing from a backup, causing
  subtle inconsistencies after restore.
- **Backups now include the license file.** Restoring on a fresh Pi
  keeps your Premiere tier intact without re-uploading the license.
- **Trailer black-bar removal handles longer trailers reliably.**
  Previously trailers around three minutes or more could time out during
  analysis and skip the auto-crop step.
- **Variable-aspect trailers preserve their full image.** Modern trailers
  that shift aspect ratio mid-clip (IMAX expansion, anamorphic sequences)
  no longer get over-cropped — when the aspect varies, the crop is
  skipped or kept conservative so nothing important gets cut off.
- **Animated movie posters no longer flash to static before the next
  movie.** Previously, when an animated poster cycled to the next movie,
  the marquee briefly showed the static version of the same poster
  before the transition. The animated frame now holds smoothly through
  the crossfade.

releases.notes:
### Fixes

- **Backups now capture the database accurately.** Previously a small
  number of recent changes could be missing from a backup, causing
  subtle inconsistencies after restore.
- **Backups now include the license file.** Restoring on a fresh Pi
  keeps your Premiere tier intact without re-uploading the license.
- **Trailer black-bar removal handles longer trailers reliably.**
  Previously trailers around three minutes or more could time out during
  analysis and skip the auto-crop step.
- **Variable-aspect trailers preserve their full image.** Modern trailers
  that shift aspect ratio mid-clip (IMAX expansion, anamorphic sequences)
  no longer get over-cropped — when the aspect varies, the crop is
  skipped or kept conservative so nothing important gets cut off.
- **Animated movie posters no longer flash to static before the next
  movie.** Previously, when an animated poster cycled to the next movie,
  the marquee briefly showed the static version of the same poster
  before the transition. The animated frame now holds smoothly through
  the crossfade.

### Fixes
- **Backups now capture the database accurately.** Previously a small number of recent changes could be missing from a backup, causing subtle inconsistencies after restore.
- **Backups now include the license file.** Restoring on a fresh Pi keeps your Premiere tier intact without re-uploading the license.

### Fixes
- **Self-healing posters.** When a movie's poster file is missing, the slideshow skips that movie cleanly (no blank frame) and re-downloads the poster in the background. The repaired poster appears on the next rotation.
- **Boot-time poster check.** On startup, htMarquee verifies every cached movie's poster file is present and re-downloads any that are missing.

### Fixes
- **HTTP ⇄ HTTPS protocol switch race:** toggling Enable HTTPS and clicking Restart no longer lands on "connection refused". The page now waits for the server to be fully ready before reloading on the new protocol.

### Fixes
- Fix first-time backup failing on fresh installs.

### Fixes
- A/B slot OTA updates no longer risk losing your data, settings, or license. Fresh v1.0.49 installs get the correct layout automatically; existing installs are migrated on the next install or update.

### Fixes
- "Failed to configure A/B slot mode" error during in-app updates is fixed. If you hit this on v1.0.47 or earlier, re-run the install command to recover:

  `curl -sSL https://htmarquee.com/install.sh | sudo bash`

### Fixes
- **Toggling "Enable HTTPS" no longer locks you out.** The save action now prompts "Restart now?" and reloads the page on whichever protocol the server comes back up on.
- **Switching auth mode (PIN ↔ Password) now prompts for a fresh credential** before saving. Previously the old credential was silently reused under the new mode.
- **Changing auth mode signs you out and rotates the session.** Open tabs and stale cookies can't keep acting under the old credential.
- **Switching auth mode to "None" shows a security confirmation** before stripping authentication.
- **Network changes** (IP, hostname, DHCP, NTP) now offer an immediate "Restart now?" button when the change requires a service restart.

### New
- Fresh installs now ship with a Big Buck Bunny demo poster and trailer so the display has working content immediately, even before a TMDB API key is set.
- Default interstitial slide that plays every 10 posters — always enabled.
- Plex and Jellyfin playback banners can now be independently shown/hidden and have their own font color pickers.
- Playback banner text is auto-fit to keep long strings on-screen.

### Fixes
- Theater Badges "Generate" button no longer triggers an accidental settings save.
- Enabling Plex or Jellyfin immediately after entering a server URL now works.
- Adding a TMDB API key on a fresh install correctly triggers the initial cache seed.

### New
- Plex and Jellyfin integrations now have enable/disable checkboxes that gate webhook processing.
- Animated theater marquee banner with chasing lights during fresh install and provisioning.

### Improvements
- Movie cards now show your preferred poster when one is set.

### New
- Animated theater marquee banner with chasing lights during fresh install and provisioning.

### Improvements
- Movie cards now show your preferred poster when one is set.

### Improvements
- Movie cards now show your preferred poster when one is set.

### Fixes
- Fix "TV Status Unknown" flickering on the dashboard. Now keeps the last known good status and only shows "unknown" after 3 consecutive failures.

### Improvements
- CEC status updates faster after sending power commands.

### Improvements
- CEC status updates faster after sending power commands.

### New: Live CEC TV Status Monitor
- TV power status now updates automatically — no more stale "TV is Off" after sending power commands.
- Dashboard TV Control panel now shows transition states ("TV Turning On..." / "TV Turning Off..."), TV name and HDMI port, and an active source indicator.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Fix animated posters flashing to the static poster during transitions.

### Improvements
- Animated posters now fade out smoothly over the last 1 second of the display cycle.
- Poster display time minimum lowered from 5 to 3 seconds.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Fix animated posters flashing to the static poster during transitions.

### Improvements
- Animated posters now fade out smoothly over the last 1 second of the display cycle.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Fix animated posters flashing to the static poster during transitions.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Revert animated poster display changes from v1.0.33-v1.0.35.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.

### Improvements
- Animated posters now use the same rendering pipeline as static posters: transitions apply correctly when entering and leaving an animated poster, video loops seamlessly, and timing is consistent.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Fix animated posters flashing to the static poster during transitions.

### Fixes
- Fix Spotlight (manual) mode getting permanently stuck on a movie.
- Fix animated posters only playing once before reverting to the static poster.

### Fixes
- Fix banner text overflowing when Plex or Jellyfin playback starts — the banner font size is now recalculated to fit.
- Fix webhook URL copy button failing on HTTP connections.
- Fix ACTIVE banner hardcoded to "Now Playing" instead of using your configured banner text.

### Improvements
- Integration banner font is now sent to the display when playback starts and restored to the idle font when playback stops.

### Fixes
- Fix kiosk display not restarting after OTA update.

### Fixes
- Fix info row icons blinking when display settings change.

### Improvements
- Bump default banner font size from 3vh to 6vh for better visibility on fresh installs.
- Restart kiosk display automatically during OTA update so updated display code takes effect without manual intervention.

### Improvements
- Format badge icons (Dolby Atmos, DTS:X, etc.) are now vertically centered on the info row.

### New
- In-app "Upgrade to Premiere" flow for Matinee users — select a plan, enter your email, and check out directly from the License tab.

### Improvements
- Removed hardcoded default PIN from fresh installs (first-run setup is now required).

### New
- In-app "Upgrade to Premiere" flow for Matinee users — select a plan, enter your email, and check out directly from the License tab.

### Improvements
- Removed hardcoded default PIN from fresh installs (first-run setup is now required).

### New
- In-app "Upgrade to Premiere" flow for Matinee users — select a plan, enter your email, and check out directly from the License tab.

### Improvements
- Removed hardcoded default PIN from fresh installs (first-run setup is now required).

### Security
- Expanded code protection coverage.

### Security
- Expanded code protection coverage to the FastAPI entry point and the kiosk display renderer.

### Security
- Expanded code protection coverage to the auth and license route handlers.

### Security
- Expanded code protection coverage to the API clients and route handlers, including the bcrypt/JWT auth helpers.

### Security
- Expanded code protection coverage. Tier quota and slideshow logic are no longer readable in plain text.

### Improvements
- Public release tarball trimmed to only the files needed to run the app.

### Fixes
- Fix login prompt incorrectly appearing on the Hardware tab for Matinee users.
- Fix release notes not appearing for the current version after a fresh install.
- Fix fresh-install crash on ethernet-only Pi.
- Fix service crash on fresh install (no A/B slots).

### Improvements
- Manifest URL field is now read-only by default with an Edit/Lock toggle.
- Backend validates manifest URL before saving.

### Fixes
- Fix fresh-install crash on ethernet-only Pi.
- Fix service startup failure on fresh install.
- Fix deprovision when the display process is still running.
- Web installer now correctly runs full provisioning on a fresh Pi.

### New
- Added deprovision script for complete htMarquee removal (supports `--dry-run` and `--full`).

### New
- Web install script for `curl | bash` installs from htmarquee.com.

### Fixes
- Font size and color now survive reboots, service restarts, and system refresh.
- Sudoers entry for OTA updates added to the install script.
- Migrated old manifest URL to the new public location for existing installations.

### New
- Adjustable banner font size with a slider (1.0–8.0vh range).
- Banner font color picker — choose any color for the header text.
- Public update distribution — all Pis now pull updates from the public manifest.

### New
- Customizable banner fonts for the display header, with 8 built-in Google Fonts (Audiowide, Barlow Condensed, Bitcount Grid Double, Doto, Geo, Monoton, Sixtyfour, Zen Tokyo Zoo).
- Upload custom .ttf/.otf/.woff/.woff2 font files for the banner.
- Separate font selection for idle, Plex, and Jellyfin playback banners.
- Font changes hot-apply via WebSocket — no restart needed.
- Release notes now displayed in the Software Update section, with expandable history.

### Fixes
- Rollback progress bar now advances instead of staying stuck at 0%.
- Rollback button is grayed out when no previous version is available.

### Fixes
- LED off now clears the entire strip regardless of configured count.
- Fixed OTA slot cleanup permission errors.

### Fixes
- Fixed LED sections not graying out when GPIO is disabled.
- OTA updates now install Pi-specific dependencies automatically.

### LED Strip Control
- LED Strip Control grays out when GPIO is disabled.
- GPIO toggle shows a restart prompt with a one-click restart button.
- Added a GPIO pinout diagram to hardware settings.

### Fixes
- Fix license tier detection — the UI no longer shows Matinee locks with a valid Premiere license.

### Security
- Improved license code protection.

### Fixes
- The app now correctly reports its release version instead of always showing v1.0.0.
Initial release.
